4403:
Cómo crear un hilo básico en Harbour:

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main()
   ? "Iniciando tarea..."
   DoWork()
   ? "Tarea completada"
   RETURN

PROCEDURE DoWork()
   LOCAL nI
   FOR nI := 1 TO 5
      ? "Trabajando...", nI
      Sleep( 100 )
   NEXT
   RETURN
```

NOTA: Harbour estándar ejecuta procedimientos de forma secuicional.
Para concurrencia real se usan librerías externas o procesos del SO.
4404:
Mutex para sincronización en Harbour:

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL nCounter := 0
   LOCAL nI

   ? "Initial:", nCounter

   FOR nI := 1 TO 1000
      nCounter++
   NEXT

   ? "Final:", nCounter

   RETURN
```

En Harbour estándar, la sincronización se logra con:
- Variables estáticas protegidas
- Archivos de bloqueo (FLOCK)
- Semáforos del sistema operativo
4405:
# Example: ThreadPool

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main
   LOCAL aThreads := {}
   LOCAL i
   FOR i := 1 TO 5
      AAdd(aThreads, HB_ThreadStart(@Worker()))
   NEXT
   FOR i := 1 TO LEN(aThreads)
      HB_ThreadWait(aThreads[i])
   NEXT
   ? "All tasks completed."
   RETURN

FUNCTION Worker()
   ? "Task running in thread:", HB_ThreadId()
   RETURN NIL
```
4406:
# Example: InterThreadMessenger

```harbour
STATIC hQueue := {=>}
STATIC oLock := HB_MutexCreate()

PROCEDURE Main
   HB_ThreadStart(@Receiver())
   HB_MutexLock(oLock)
   HB_HSet(hQueue, "msg", "Hello from sender!")
   HB_MutexUnLock(oLock)
   HB_IdleSleep(500)
   RETURN

PROCEDURE Receiver()
   LOCAL cMsg
   DO WHILE .T.
      HB_MutexLock(oLock)
      IF HB_HHasKey(hQueue, "msg")
         cMsg := HB_HGet(hQueue, "msg")
         HB_HDel(hQueue, "msg")
         HB_MutexUnLock(oLock)
         ? "Received:", cMsg
         RETURN
      ENDIF
      HB_MutexUnLock(oLock)
      HB_IdleSleep(100)
   ENDDO
   RETURN
```
4407:
# Example: Semaphore

```harbour
STATIC nSemaphore := 0
STATIC oLock := HB_MutexCreate()

PROCEDURE Main
   LOCAL i
   FOR i := 1 TO 3
      HB_ThreadStart(@Worker())
   NEXT
   HB_IdleSleep(2000)
   ? "Semaphore value:", nSemaphore
   RETURN

PROCEDURE Worker()
   HB_MutexLock(oLock)
   nSemaphore++
   HB_MutexUnLock(oLock)
   ? "Worker done."
   RETURN
```

4413:
# Example: BEGIN SEQUENCE

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main
   LOCAL nResult
   BEGIN SEQUENCE
      nResult := 10 / 0
      ? "Result:", nResult
   RECOVER
      ? "Error caught: Division by zero"
   END SEQUENCE
   ? "Program continues."
   RETURN
```
4414:
# Example: ErrorLogger

```harbour
STATIC oLock := HB_MutexCreate()
STATIC aLog := {}

PROCEDURE Main
   LogError("Test error 1")
   LogError("Test error 2")
   DisplayLog()
   RETURN

PROCEDURE LogError(cMessage)
   HB_MutexLock(oLock)
   AAdd(aLog, cMessage)
   HB_MutexUnLock(oLock)
   RETURN

PROCEDURE DisplayLog()
   LOCAL i
   HB_MutexLock(oLock)
   FOR i := 1 TO LEN(aLog)
      ? "Log:", aLog[i]
   NEXT
   HB_MutexUnLock(oLock)
   RETURN
```
4415:
Retry con backoff exponencial:

```harbour
FUNCTION RetryWithBackoff( bOperation, nMaxRetries, nBaseDelay )
   LOCAL nAttempt := 0
   LOCAL nDelay
   LOCAL lSuccess := .F.
   LOCAL nMax

   IF nMaxRetries == NIL
      nMaxRetries := 3
   ENDIF
   IF nBaseDelay == NIL
      nBaseDelay := 1000
   ENDIF

   WHILE !lSuccess .AND. nAttempt < nMaxRetries
      BEGIN SEQUENCE
         EVAL( bOperation )
         lSuccess := .T.
      RECOVER
         nAttempt++
         nDelay := nBaseDelay * (2 ^ (nAttempt - 1))
         ? "Intento", nAttempt, "falló, reintentando en", nDelay, "ms"
         Sleep( nDelay )
      END SEQUENCE
   ENDDO

   RETURN lSuccess
```

Uso:
```harbour
lOk := RetryWithBackoff( {|| ConnectToServer() }, 5, 500 )
```
4416:
Conexión con reconexión automática:

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL lConnected := .F.
   LOCAL nRetries := 0
   LOCAL nMaxRetries := 5

   WHILE !lConnected .AND. nRetries < nMaxRetries
      BEGIN SEQUENCE
         ? "Intentando conectar..."
         lConnected := .T.
         ? "Conectado!"
      RECOVER
         nRetries++
         ? "Error de conexión, reintento", nRetries
         Sleep( 1000 * nRetries )
      END SEQUENCE
   ENDDO

   IF !lConnected
      ? "No se pudo conectar"
   ENDIF

   RETURN
```
4417:
# Example: ConsultaDBF

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main
   USE Clientes ALIAS cClientes SHARED NEW
   LOCATE FOR cClientes->Nombre == "Juan"
   IF FOUND()
      ? "Found:", cClientes->Nombre
   ELSE
      ? "Not found"
   ENDIF
   CLOSE Clientes
   RETURN
```

4419:
Modelo ORM básico:

```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
CLASS Customer
   DATA nId
   DATA cName

   METHOD New()
   METHOD Show()
   METHOD Save()
ENDCLASS

METHOD New() CLASS Customer
   ::nId := 0
   ::cName := ""
   RETURN SELF

METHOD Show() CLASS Customer
   ? "ID:", ::nId, "Nombre:", ::cName
   RETURN NIL

METHOD Save() CLASS Customer
   ? "Guardando cliente:", ::cName
   RETURN .T.

PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL oModel

   oModel := Customer():New()
   oModel:nId := 1
   oModel:cName := "Juan"
   oModel:Show()
   oModel:Save()

   RETURN
```

Uso:
```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
oModel := Customer():New()
oModel:cName := "Juan"
oModel:Save()
```
4420:
# Example: QueryCache

```harbour
STATIC hCache := {=>}

PROCEDURE Main
   LOCAL cKey := "query1"
   LOCAL cResult := "SELECT * FROM table"
   HB_HSet(hCache, cKey, cResult)
   IF HB_HHasKey(hCache, cKey)
      ? "Cached:", HB_HGet(hCache, cKey)
   ENDIF
   RETURN
```
4421:
Herencia en Harbour:

```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
CLASS Animal
   DATA cName
   DATA nAge

   METHOD New()
   METHOD Speak()
   METHOD Describe()
ENDCLASS

METHOD New() CLASS Animal
   ::cName := ""
   ::nAge := 0
   RETURN SELF

METHOD Speak() CLASS Animal
   RETURN "..."

METHOD Describe() CLASS Animal
   RETURN ::cName + " tiene " + AllTrim( Str( ::nAge ) ) + " años"

CLASS Dog
   DATA cName
   DATA nAge
   DATA cBreed

   METHOD New()
   METHOD Speak()
   METHOD Describe()
ENDCLASS

METHOD New() CLASS Dog
   ::cName := ""
   ::nAge := 0
   ::cBreed := ""
   RETURN SELF

METHOD Speak() CLASS Dog
   RETURN "Guau!"

METHOD Describe() CLASS Dog
   RETURN ::cName + " (" + ::cBreed + ") tiene " + AllTrim( Str( ::nAge ) ) + " años"

PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL oDog

   oDog := Dog():New()
   oDog:cName := "Max"
   oDog:nAge := 3
   oDog:cBreed := "Labrador"
   ? oDog:Speak()
   ? oDog:Describe()

   RETURN
```
4422:
Patrón Singleton:

```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
CLASS Singleton
   DATA cValue

   METHOD New()
   METHOD GetValue()
ENDCLASS

METHOD New() CLASS Singleton
   ::cValue := "Singleton"
   RETURN SELF

METHOD GetValue() CLASS Singleton
   RETURN ::cValue

STATIC FUNCTION GetSingleton()
   STATIC oInstance := NIL
   IF oInstance == NIL
      oInstance := Singleton():New()
   ENDIF
   RETURN oInstance

PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL o1 := GetSingleton()
   LOCAL o2 := GetSingleton()

   ? o1 == o2
   ? o1:GetValue()

   RETURN
```
4423:
Patrón mixin de serialización:

```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
CLASS User
   DATA cName
   DATA cEmail

   METHOD New()
   METHOD Serialize()
   METHOD ToJson()
ENDCLASS

METHOD New() CLASS User
   ::cName := ""
   ::cEmail := ""
   RETURN SELF

METHOD Serialize() CLASS User
   RETURN "Serialized"

METHOD ToJson() CLASS User
   RETURN '{"name":"' + ::cName + '","email":"' + ::cEmail + '"}'

PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL oUser

   oUser := User():New()
   oUser:cName := "Juan"
   oUser:cEmail := "juan@test.com"
   ? oUser:Serialize()
   ? oUser:ToJson()

   RETURN
```

Uso:
```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
oUser := User():New()
oUser:cName := "Juan"
? oUser:ToJson()
```
4424:
Patrón Observer:

```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
CLASS Observable
   DATA aItems

   METHOD New()
   METHOD AddItem()
   METHOD NotifyAll()
ENDCLASS

METHOD New() CLASS Observable
   ::aItems := {}
   RETURN SELF

METHOD AddItem( cItem ) CLASS Observable
   AAdd( ::aItems, cItem )
   RETURN NIL

METHOD NotifyAll() CLASS Observable
   LOCAL cItem
   FOR EACH cItem IN ::aItems
      ? "Evento:", cItem
   NEXT
   RETURN NIL

PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL oObservable

   oObservable := Observable():New()
   oObservable:AddItem( "evento1" )
   oObservable:NotifyAll()

   RETURN
```
4425:
Patrón Factory:

```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
CLASS Circle
   DATA nRadius

   METHOD New()
   METHOD Draw()
ENDCLASS

METHOD New() CLASS Circle
   ::nRadius := 5
   RETURN SELF

METHOD Draw() CLASS Circle
   ? "Círculo radio", ::nRadius
   RETURN NIL

STATIC FUNCTION CreateShape( cType )
   IF cType == "circle"
      RETURN Circle():New()
   ENDIF
   ? "Tipo desconocido:", cType
   RETURN NIL

PROCEDURE Main()
   LOCAL oShape

   oShape := CreateShape( "circle" )
   IF oShape != NIL
      oShape:Draw()
   ENDIF

   RETURN
```

Uso:
```harbour
#include "hbclass.ch"
oShape := CreateShape( "circle" )
oShape:Draw()
```

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main
   USE Clientes ALIAS cClientes SHARED NEW
   ? "Records:", RECCOUNT()

```
4427:
# Example: SET FILTER fix

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main
   USE Clientes ALIAS cClientes SHARED NEW
   SET FILTER TO cClientes->Activo == .T.
   GO TOP
   DO WHILE !EOF()
      ? cClientes->Nombre
      SKIP
   ENDDO
   SET FILTER TO
   CLOSE Clientes
   RETURN
```
4428:
# Example: DBF lock fix

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main
   USE Clientes ALIAS cClientes SHARED NEW
   IF RLOCK()
      cClientes->Saldo := cClientes->Saldo + 100
      UNLOCK
      ? "Record updated."
   ELSE
      ? "Could not lock record."
   ENDIF
   CLOSE Clientes
   RETURN
```
4429:
# Example: Optimize query

```harbour
PROCEDURE Main
   USE Clientes ALIAS cClientes SHARED NEW
   INDEX ON cClientes->Codigo TO idxCodigo
   SEEK "001"
   IF FOUND()
      ? "Found:", cClientes->Nombre
   ENDIF
   CLOSE Clientes
   RETURN
```
